name: Zenefits
description: Zenefits HR platform for payroll, benefits, and HR management

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Zenefits at https://secure.zenefits.com
2. Go to Settings → Custom Integrations → API Tokens
3. Generate a new token with People read access
4. Enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Zenefits Settings → Custom Integrations → API Tokens

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Lists TriNet HR Platform employees to verify HR access is active
